member.name: T:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles authentication and identity-related endpoints.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ExternalLogin(StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Auth.ExternalLoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user with external identity provider credentials.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rotates refresh token and returns a new access/refresh token pair.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Logout(StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Auth.LogoutRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes refresh token(s) for the current user.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Me(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current authenticated user profile.

member.name: T:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController
member.summary: Provides conversation and membership management endpoints.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.GetConversations(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all active conversations for the current user.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.CreatePrivateConversation(StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Conversations.CreatePrivateConversationRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a private (1:1) conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.CreateGroupConversation(StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Conversations.CreateGroupConversationRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a group conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.AddMember(System.Int32,StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Conversations.AddConversationMemberRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a member to a group conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.RemoveMember(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a member from a conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.LeaveConversation(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Current user leaves a conversation.

member.name: T:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController
member.summary: Provides message query and interaction endpoints.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.GetMessages(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns conversation messages in descending created time order with cursor pagination.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.SendMessage(System.Int32,StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Messages.SendMessageRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a new message to a conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.AddReaction(System.Int64,StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Application.DTOs.Messages.AddMessageReactionRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a reaction to a message.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.RemoveReaction(System.Int64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the current user's reaction from a message.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.MarkConversationAsRead(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks all messages in a conversation as read for the current user.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.GetPinnedMessages(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all pinned messages in a conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.PinMessage(System.Int32,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pins a message in a conversation.

member.name: M:StudentSocialNetwork.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.UnpinMessage(System.Int32,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Unpins a message in a conversation.
